name: TRM Labs Blockchain Intelligence and Crypto Compliance API
what_it_does: TRM Labs blockchain intelligence and crypto compliance REST API for cryptocurrency exchanges, financial institutions, and fintech companies to perform real-time blockchain transaction screening, entity risk scoring, sanctions compliance, and on-chain forensics across 30+ blockchain networks — enabling automated AML/KYC compliance for crypto assets, fraud detection, sanctions screening against OFAC/SDN lists, and blockchain analytics for regulatory compliance and risk management. Enables AI agents to manage transaction screening for real-time crypto AML compliance automation, handle entity risk scoring for blockchain address risk assessment automation, access sanctions screening for OFAC and global sanctions list compliance automation, retrieve transaction tracing for crypto forensics and fund flow automation, manage wallet risk for counterparty due diligence automation, handle batch screening for high-volume address compliance automation, access blockchain analytics for on-chain intelligence reporting automation, retrieve risk indicators for crypto fraud detection automation, manage investigation for blockchain forensics case management automation, and integrate TRM with crypto exchange, DeFi platform, and financial institution compliance workflows for blockchain AML automation.
use_cases: Screening cryptocurrency transactions for AML compliance and sanctions violations at crypto exchanges automation agents
Assessing blockchain address risk scores for counterparty due diligence in crypto financial services automation agents
Performing OFAC SDN and global sanctions list screening for crypto asset service providers automation agents
Conducting on-chain forensics and transaction tracing for crypto fraud investigation and recovery automation agents
not_for: Non-blockchain financial monitoring (TRM focuses on on-chain crypto, not traditional banking AML)
Consumer crypto wallet recommendations (TRM is institutional compliance, not retail crypto advice)
Real-time trading signals (TRM provides compliance intelligence, not trading analytics)
best_when: A cryptocurrency exchange, DeFi platform, NFT marketplace, or financial institution wanting AI agents to perform real-time blockchain transaction screening, sanctions compliance, and crypto AML monitoring across 30+ blockchain networks.
avoid_when: ENTERPRISE CONTRACT REQUIRED: TRM Labs API requires enterprise customer agreement; automated developer self-service access assumption creates no API credentials; automated must establish TRM Labs enterprise subscription. BLOCKCHAIN COVERAGE IS NOT UNIVERSAL: TRM covers 30+ major blockchains but not all chains; automated all-blockchain coverage assumption creates unsupported_blockchain for niche chains; automated must verify TRM coverage for specific blockchain networks. DATA FRESHNESS VARIES BY CHAIN: Risk scoring data freshness varies by blockchain and transaction age; automated real-time certainty assumption creates latency for slow or low-liquidity chains; automated must account for data freshness indicators in risk decisions. COMPLIANCE DECISIONS REQUIRE HUMAN REVIEW: TRM risk scores inform compliance decisions but should not replace human judgment for high-risk flags; automated auto-block based on TRM score assumption creates false positive customer friction; automated must implement risk-tiered human review workflow.

auth.notes: TRM Labs uses API key (Basic auth) for API authentication. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, CA HQ. Founded 2018 by Esteban Castaño and Mark Fischer. Products: Blockchain screening, entity risk scoring, sanctions compliance, transaction monitoring, investigations, network visualization. SDKs: Python, JS. Covers 30+ blockchains (BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, etc.). FinCEN/OFAC alignment. Backed by a16z, Tiger Global, PayPal Ventures, Goldman Sachs. Competes with Chainalysis for crypto compliance.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Demo access for evaluation; production requires enterprise contract
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-transaction screening fees; entity lookups; batch processing packages; enterprise subscriptions
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. Enterprise contract. Per-transaction + entity screening. 30+ blockchains. Crypto compliance leader.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; real-time screening APIs optimized; batch processing separate

known_agent_gotchas: RISK SCORES ARE PROBABILISTIC NOT BINARY: TRM risk scores are 0-100 probability scores, not definitive block/pass decisions; automated binary block-on-score assumption creates over-restrictive compliance; automated must implement risk-tiered review workflow (auto-pass low risk, auto-block high risk, human review medium risk)

ADDRESS VS TRANSACTION SCREENING ARE DIFFERENT: TRM offers both address-level entity risk scoring and transaction-level screening; automated single screening type assumption misses complementary coverage; automated should implement both address screening (counterparty due diligence) and transaction screening (real-time monitoring)

BLOCKCHAIN-SPECIFIC RESPONSE FORMATS: TRM risk response formats vary slightly by blockchain; automated uniform format assumption creates parsing issues for multi-chain implementations; automated must handle blockchain-specific response structures

BATCH PROCESSING HAS SEPARATE LIMITS: TRM batch screening for high-volume address compliance has separate rate limits from real-time API; automated uniform rate limit assumption creates throttling in high-volume batch processing; automated must implement batch-specific rate limit management

SANCTIONS HIT REQUIRES IMMEDIATE ACTION: OFAC/SDN sanctions matches require immediate transaction blocking per regulatory requirements; automated delayed human review for sanctions hits assumption creates FinCEN/OFAC compliance violation; automated must implement immediate block + SAR filing workflow for confirmed sanctions matches
agent_readiness.security_notes: Blockchain intelligence and crypto compliance. FinCEN, OFAC, FATF, BSA. API key. US/EU. Blockchain transaction and entity data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Crypto compliance. FinCEN, OFAC, BSA, FATF. API key. US/EU. Blockchain transaction and compliance data.
